scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,admin -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w admin"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w web && npm run lint -w api && npm run lint -w admin
scripts.db:migrate: node scripts/ensure-api-env.mjs && npm run prisma:migrate -w api
scripts.db:seed: node scripts/ensure-api-env.mjs && npm run prisma:seed -w api
scripts.db:studio: node scripts/ensure-api-env.mjs && npm run prisma:studio -w api
scripts.db:migrate:init: node scripts/ensure-api-env.mjs && npm run prisma:migrate -w api -- --name init
